title: Bagging (Bootstrap Aggregating) Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of creating a Bagging ensemble model, from generating bootstrap samples to aggregating the final prediction.
relationships: Original Dataset is sampled with replacement to create multiple Bootstrap Samples
Each Bootstrap Sample trains a separate Base Model (typically weak learners)
All Base Models make predictions on new data
Aggregator combines all predictions to produce a Final Prediction
